\centering
\caption{Five-fold CV Pearson $r$ and rollout RMSE. Pearson $r$ values are Fisher-$z$ mean $\pm$ half-range of the 1-SD interval, back-transformed to $r$-space. RMSE is plain mean $\pm$ 1~SD. Both are pooled across neurons and folds. \textcolor{green!50!black}{Green}: value $>0.9$.}
\label{tab:cv_baselines_sym}
\tiny
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{4pt}
\begin{tabular}{lcrrrrr}
\toprule
condition & noise $\sigma$ & params (M) & rollout steps & one-step $r$ & rollout $r$ & rollout RMSE \\
\midrule
Stimulus, $t_w{=}1$, noise-free    & $0$  & 7.58 & --- & $0.42{\pm}0.29$ & --- & --- \\
Stimulus, $t_w{=}4$, noise-free    & $0$  & 7.67 & --- & $0.73{\pm}0.30$ & --- & --- \\
Stimulus, $t_w{=}8$, noise-free    & $0$  & 7.81 & --- & \good{$0.92{\pm}0.09$} & --- & --- \\
Stimulus, $t_w{=}16$, noise-free   & $0$  & 8.07 & --- & \good{$0.97{\pm}0.03$} & --- & --- \\
\midrule
MLP, noise-free                    & $0$  & 29.05 & 20 & \good{$0.95{\pm}0.04$} & \good{$0.96{\pm}0.05$} & $0.080{\pm}0.057$ \\
MLP, $\sigma{=}0.05$               & $0.05$  & 29.05 & 20 & \good{$0.92{\pm}0.07$} & \good{$0.93{\pm}0.11$} & $0.128{\pm}0.105$ \\
MLP, $\sigma{=}0.5$                & $0.5$  & 29.05 & 20 & $0.69{\pm}0.18$ & $0.78{\pm}0.24$ & $0.259{\pm}0.239$ \\
\midrule
EED, noise-free                    & $0$  & 19.52 & 5 & \good{$0.92{\pm}0.08$} & \good{$0.97{\pm}0.03$} & $0.053{\pm}0.035$ \\
EED, $\sigma{=}0.05$               & $0.05$  & 19.52 & 5 & $0.90{\pm}0.10$ & \good{$0.97{\pm}0.04$} & $0.060{\pm}0.039$ \\
EED, $\sigma{=}0.5$                & $0.5$  & 19.52 & 5 & $0.60{\pm}0.20$ & $0.77{\pm}0.25$ & $0.276{\pm}0.257$ \\

% ---------------------------------------------------------------
% Asymmetric super/subscript version of the table above. Each r
% cell reads $r^{+up}_{-dn}$, where (up, dn) are the back-
% transformed Fisher-z ±1 SD bounds — up = tanh(z+sd) - r,
% dn = r - tanh(z-sd). RMSE uses the same notation but without
% any transform (bounds are literal ±1 SD).
% ---------------------------------------------------------------
